items.title: Behind the Scenes at Pace
items.summary: Employees describe the gallery’s disorienting layoffs, Brenda Goodman looks back on her six-decade practice, and artists urge Mayor Mamdani to ban AI in schools.

items.title: Pace Gallery’s Hall of Mirrors
items.summary: Despite a tightly controlled narrative, for some workers and artists, the mega-gallery’s downsizing has left more questions than answers.

items.title: Who Will Fight for Artists' Rights in Congress?
items.summary: Democratic Congressman Jerry Nadler has led the fight to bring resale royalties to artists in the US. With his retirement, it could all go away.

items.title: James Cahill’s Character Study of the Art World
items.summary: “The Violet Hour” is a dreamy chronicle of fame, greed, and ambition, full of cartoonish personalities you’ve likely had the misfortune of encountering firsthand.
